ABOUT US
Careers
Who is Virica Biotech?

We are a hyper-growth biotechnology company enabling viral medicines that improve the lives of people. We own proprietary small molecules called Viral Sensitizers (VSE™) that target the natural antiviral defenses of cells to boost virus manufacturing yields (e.g., vaccines) and improve the effectiveness of therapeutics that rely on viral vectors (e.g., gene therapy). VSEs represent a paradigm shift that could transform the viral medicines industry.

We Support Diversity & Inclusion

We believe in fostering a diverse and inclusive community of employees. We celebrate and support our differences in race, ethnicity, gender, age, religion, disability and sexual orientation. We seek diverse perspectives and value contributions from every member of our team.

We Believe in Corporate Social Responsibility

We operate in a manner that creates a safe and healthful workplace for our people and the communities we live, work and play. We commit to ensure healthy lives. It’s in our DNA.
